overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a futuristic cyberpunk city street in a video game, featuring neon billboards, towering skyscrapers, and scattered debris. The camera moves steadily along the road before ascending a wide staircase to an upper level where a character stands.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a deserted cyberpunk street up toward an elevated urban plaza. It begins by gliding along a road flanked by towering digital billboards, passing a yellow taxi as a red-striped skyscraper looms in the distance. As the camera reaches the end of the road, the scene shifts onto a concrete sidewalk cluttered with trash bags and a cherry blossom tree, passing a futuristic vending machine at the base of a wide staircase. The camera then ascends these stairs, moving from the street level into an upper plaza filled with holographic neon signs and another cherry blossom tree. Finally, the view opens up to reveal more of the futuristic cityscape as a gray car passes by and the camera approaches a woman standing at the top of the stairs.
